recommendations.title: DB-bound — batched writes + bounded pool already mitigate; consider +workers
recommendations.action: ensure batched-write canary on; add workers only within conn ceiling

recommendations.title: Source-hunter hourly cadence is appropriate
recommendations.finding: hunter OnUnitActiveSec=1h (12min first-run); source discovery is low-churn
recommendations.action: keep hourly; no need to run faster for source discovery

auto_safe.title: DB-bound — batched writes + bounded pool already mitigate; consider +workers
auto_safe.action: ensure batched-write canary on; add workers only within conn ceiling
